caption: The video begins with a static shot of the TFNN.com logo, prominently displayed against a light, swirling background. The text "TFNN.com" is written in bold, dark blue letters, followed by the tagline "EDUCATING INVESTORS" in smaller, lighter blue font. Below this, the words "Tiger-TV" appear in large, three-dimensional letters with a gradient effect, transitioning from black to blue. The scene remains unchanged throughout the sequence, maintaining a professional and clean aesthetic that suggests an educational or informational program focused on investing. The consistent visual elements reinforce the brand identity of TFNN.com and set the stage for content aimed at investor education.
